founding.name: Founding of Olundar
founding.text: Balanced start with the capital, a scout, an engineer, and enough time to choose your first frontier.

victoryConditions.label: Shatter the Bone Portal
victoryConditions.text: Kill Vorgath and destroy the Bone Portal.

victoryConditions.label: Bind one Survival Pact
victoryConditions.text: Secure at least one living faction pact before the endgame siege.

dawnroad.name: Dawnward Road Compact
dawnroad.text: A northern road campaign with extra influence and a sworn spear for early alliance play.

victoryConditions.label: Forge a road coalition
victoryConditions.text: Hold two Survival Pacts while the road front is still alive.

victoryConditions.label: Break the portal war
victoryConditions.text: Destroy the Bone Portal after the coalition forms.

marketCrown.name: Veyr Market Crown
marketCrown.text: A coin-rich start that can rush trade, cavalry, or mercantile pressure at a morale cost.

victoryConditions.label: Open two trade routes
victoryConditions.text: Turn coin into at least two active trade compacts.

victoryConditions.label: Fund the final siege
victoryConditions.text: Use the market start to reach and destroy the Bone Portal.

ashgate.name: Ash Gate Frontier
ashgate.text: A harder siege-forward start with more iron and stone, less morale, and faster eastern pressure.

victoryConditions.label: Crack two deadworks
victoryConditions.text: Destroy two Deadwalker strongholds before committing to the portal.

victoryConditions.label: Close Ash Gate
victoryConditions.text: Destroy the Bone Portal on a harder siege-forward front.

ironVanguard.name: Iron Vanguard
ironVanguard.text: A siege-forward campaign with an early workshop, one onager crew, exposed iron hills, and deadworks that must be cracked before the final push.

victoryConditions.label: Crack three deadworks
victoryConditions.text: Use the early onager and workshop to destroy three Deadwalker strongholds.

victoryConditions.label: Breach the Bone Portal
victoryConditions.text: Finish the siege by destroying the Bone Portal.

mireVeil.name: Mire Veil Routes
mireVeil.text: A marsh-heavy scouting campaign with extra food, route guides, and slow approaches that reward alliances and careful terrain reading.

victoryConditions.label: Map all living routes
victoryConditions.text: Contact every living civilization through the marsh route web.

victoryConditions.label: Hold two marsh oaths
victoryConditions.text: Maintain two Survival Pacts before the portal siege.

victoryConditions.label: End the blight trail
victoryConditions.text: Destroy the Bone Portal after the route network is secure.

hollowEclipse.name: Hollow Eclipse
hollowEclipse.text: A brutal challenge start with closer blight, a forward Rally Banner, lower morale, and an early march that tests defensive discipline immediately.

victoryConditions.label: Survive the first eclipse
victoryConditions.text: Reach turn 12 with Olundar Prime standing.

victoryConditions.label: Keep morale at four
victoryConditions.text: Do not let morale collapse below four during the opening crisis.

victoryConditions.label: Break the Hollow Eclipse
victoryConditions.text: Destroy the Bone Portal after surviving the early march.

proceduralFrontier.name: Procedural Frontier
proceduralFrontier.text: A seeded campaign generator that reshuffles living factions, resource scarcity, the Deadwalker front, and victory pressure while keeping the Olundar story coherent.

victoryConditions.label: Bind a generated pact
victoryConditions.text: Generated campaigns choose their own pact target from the seed.

victoryConditions.label: End the generated war
victoryConditions.text: Destroy the Bone Portal in the generated frontier.

weeklyChallenge.name: Weekly Challenge
weeklyChallenge.text: A locked weekly procedural campaign seed for comparable runs, leaderboard exports, and one-more-campaign replayability.

victoryConditions.label: Bind the weekly pact
victoryConditions.text: The active weekly seed chooses its own pact target.

victoryConditions.label: End the weekly war
victoryConditions.text: Destroy the Bone Portal on this week's locked frontier.
